ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard (e.g., US, EU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the standard is most commonly used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measures" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size designation (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "bust_inch" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_inch" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_inch" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_inch" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_inch" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width_inch" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "front_length_inch" REAL /* Front length measurement in inches */,
  "back_length_inch" REAL /* Back length measurement in inches */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measures_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_charts" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "from_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original size standard */,
  "to_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target size standard */,
  "from_size" TEXT /* Size in the original standard */,
  "to_size" TEXT /* Size in the target standard */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_charts_to_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_charts_from_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing size being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "comfort_rating" INTEGER /* Comfort rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "sizing_accuracy" INTEGER /* Sizing accuracy rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when feedback was submitted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_measures ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "height_inch" REAL /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  "weight_lbs" REAL /* Weight of the customer in pounds */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred clothing category (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "guide_text" TEXT /* Text containing detailed size guide information */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the guide was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the preference */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "preferred_category" TEXT /* Preferred clothing category (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_measures ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being tracked */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in that size */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Women's, Men's, Children's) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the trend was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_measures ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, merchandiser, data analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
